DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
theme token-api token-value token
style
pattern

DSDS Design Specifications Definitions

Definitions for documenting the visual design specifications of a component — spacing, sizing, responsive behavior, and associated design tokens.

Source: components/design-specifications.schema.json

2 definitions in this file:

  • responsiveEntry
  • designSpecifications

responsiveEntry

A responsive behavior specification.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
breakpointstringrequiredThe breakpoint name or value.
descriptionrichTextrequired

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "breakpoint": "768px",
    "description": "Below 768px, buttons in a button group stack vertically and expand to full width."
  },
  {
    "breakpoint": "1024px",
    "description": "Above 1024px, the minimum button width increases from 44px to 64px to provide a more comfortable click target on desktop."
  }
]

designSpecifications

Visual design specifications for a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
tokensstring[]optionalAll design token names used by this component.
spacingobjectoptionalSpacing specifications.
sizingobjectoptionalDimension constraints.
responsiveresponsiveEntry[]optionalResponsive behavior documentation.

References: responsiveEntry

Example

{
  "tokens": [
    "button-background",
    "button-text-color",
    "button-border-color",
    "button-border-radius",
    "button-padding-horizontal",
    "button-padding-vertical",
    "button-font-size",
    "button-font-weight",
    "button-line-height",
    "button-icon-size",
    "button-icon-color",
    "button-icon-gap",
    "button-focus-ring-color",
    "button-focus-ring-width",
    "button-focus-ring-offset"
  ],
  "spacing": {
    "internal": {
      "container-horizontal": "space-4",
      "container-vertical": "space-2",
      "icon-to-label": "space-2"
    },
    "external": {
      "button-to-button": "space-2",
      "button-group-gap": "space-3"
    }
  },
  "sizing": {
    "minWidth": "44px",
    "minHeight": "44px",
    "maxWidth": "none",
    "aspectRatio": "auto"
  },
  "responsive": [
    {
      "breakpoint": "768px",
      "description": "Below 768px, buttons in a button group stack vertically and expand to full width."
    },
    {
      "breakpoint": "1024px",
      "description": "Above 1024px, the minimum button width increases from 44px to 64px."
    }
  ]
}
↑ Back to top
